DISCOVERY 302, PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION DEFENDANTS KRISTIN HAUG, DAVID HAUG'S REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AND TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF CESAR DELGADILLO IS ORDERED TO PAY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,511,00 WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. THE CASE IS HERBEY DISMISSED. PLAINTIFF TO TAKE NOTHING BY HIS COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITIONS IS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE DISMISSAL. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-24-2014 Vacated

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-24-2014 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was uncontested. T. TROY OTUS, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF CESAR DELGADILLO is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The Court modified and signed the order that was submitted with the moving papers. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition
Off Calendar Jul-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
T. Troy Otus Esq. of The Otus Law Group (650-548-2100) for Cesar Delgadillo Plaintiff and opposing party.
Katelyn Knight, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming LLP (415-524-0477) for Kristin Haug Defendant and moving party.

Parties appeared and stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANTs KRISTIN HAUG, DAVID HAUG's Motion To Compel Deposition is taken under submission. OSC set for August 22, 2014 is off calendar per Court's own motion.Moving party to submit a proposed Amended order. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motiont O Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Katelyn M. Knight, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming LLP, Tel. 415.524.4300, for defendants and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendant's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs KRISTIN HAUG and DAVID HAUG's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is Granted. Plaintiff to provide verified responses to all discovery within 30 days. The reason for the lengthy period of time to respond is to permit plaintiff's counsel to file a motion to withdraw as indicated in the papers and give plaintiff notice of the ruling. Sanctions in the amount of $500 awarded against plaintiff party only, not against attorneys, to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
